name: Elena
manager_notes: Since the reorg, Elena is still delivering but has pulled back in leadership forums and appears less connected in team interactions. I want to check in without over-interpreting, and understand whether this is temporary transition load or a deeper mismatch in scope and support. She has not asked for help directly, which can hide meaningful strain. This should remain observation-first and low-pressure: make space for her perspective, then identify what support would actually help right now.
answers: Feels the shift since the reorg, even while trying to keep things stable for the team.
Quieter in leadership meetings — still figuring out where her voice has most leverage.
Tired from constant context switching, and hasn't said that out loud.
Doesn't think anything's broken, but feels less grounded than before.
Protecting her team from noise → carrying more ambiguity herself.
Not fully clear yet on how success is measured in the new setup.
Wants clearer prioritization and a little more air cover in cross-team decisions.
Wants to re-engage more visibly, but needs steadier footing first.
Would start by naming one cross-team decision where clearer air cover would help her re-engage.
